## Test Plan

Describe how you verified these changes work correctly. Include steps to reproduce manually if automated tests are not sufficient.

## Checklist

- [ ] `npm run lint` passes
- [ ] `npm run typecheck` passes
- [ ] `npm run test` passes (new tests added where appropriate)
- [ ] Tested manually on at least one platform (macOS / Linux / Windows)
- [ ] IPC channel additions are reflected in `src/common/ipc.ts`, `src/common/bridge.ts`, and `src/main/preload.ts`
- [ ] No hardcoded credentials, tokens, or `.mmdb` files committed
- [ ] PR description and commit message(s) clearly explain the intent of the change
